case_title: BENNIE CHESTNUT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHESTNUT, BENNIE AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $120.00 FILED BY CHESTNUT, BENNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED SEP-05-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED SEP-06-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-24-2013 AT 1:30 PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED SEP-06-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE ECHAVIA--INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHESTNUT, BENNIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHESTNUT, BENNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
